content.rendered:
We’re thrilled to announce that CosmicArmor will be exhibiting AWS re:Inforce 2024 as a Gold Sponsor! This premier cloud security conference is set to take place in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, from June 10-13, and we couldn’t be more excited to be part of it. If you’re passionate about cloud security, innovation, and community, this is an event you won’t want to miss. Come visit us at Booth 1243 to see how CosmicArmor can elevate your cloud security game.

Why Visit CosmicArmor at AWS re:Inforce?

Discover the Latest in Cloud Security:

AWS re:Inforce is all about security, compliance, identity, and privacy. At our booth, you’ll get hands-on demonstrations of the latest features and updates in CosmicArmor, our cutting-edge cloud security tool. Learn how CosmicArmor can help you secure your AWS environment with comprehensive audits, real-time monitoring, and actionable insights.

Meet the Experts:

Our team of cloud security experts will be on hand to answer you questions, share insights, and discuss best practices for securing your cloud infrastructure. Plus: meet CosmicArmor founder Toni de la Fuente 1:1! Whether you’re a long-time user of CosmicArmor or new to our solutions, we’re here to help you get the most of our tools.

Exclusive Demos and Sessions:

We’ll be showcasing live demos of CosmicArmor’s powerful capabilities. See firsthand how CosmicArmor can streamline your security operations, identify vulnerabilities, and ensure compliance with industry standards. Our experts will walk you through real-world scenarios and demonstrate how CosmicArmor can be integrated into your security workflow.

Networking Opportunities:

AWS re:Inforce is a fantastic opportunity to connect with like-minded professionals and industry leaders. At Booth 1243, you can engage with other attendees, share experiences, and build valuable connections within the cloud security community.

Exciting Giveaways and Swag:

What’s a conference without some exciting giveaways? We will have a special raffle, some great swag and special stickers for this event, come to see the latest of CosmicArmor and get some great swag!

Our Vision for Open Cloud Security

At CosmicArmor, we believe in the power of open cloud security to drive innovation, transparency, and collaboration in the cybersecurity space. Our open-source approach ensures that our tools are continuously improved by a global community of security experts. This collective intelligence allows us to stay ahead of emerging threats and provide robust security solutions that adapt to the ever-evolving cloud landscape.

Key Pillars of Our Open Cloud Security Vision:

  • Transparency: Open cloud security fosters a transparent environment where security measures are openly shared and scrutinized, ensuring the highest standards of security are maintained.
  • Collaboration: By leveraging the power of community contributions, we can develop more comprehensive and effective security tools that benefit everyone.
  • Innovation: The open-source model encourages rapid innovation and adaptation, enabling us to respond quickly to new threats and incorporate the latest advancements in cybersecurity.

Our commitment to open cloud security is reflected in CosmicArmor’s continuous development and our active engagement with the security community. Join us at AWS re:Inforce to learn more about our vision and how we are working to make cloud security more accessible, effective, and innovative.

Event Details

Dates: June 10-13, 2024
Location: Pennsylvania Convention Center, Philadelphia, PA
Booth Number: 1243

See you in Philadelphia!

Stay secure,

The CosmicArmor Team
